channel.title: AI Unfiltered
channel.description: Chinese AI • Open Source • Security • Incidents. Signal, not noise.

item.title: Users may experience elevated error rate in Codex
item.description: Status: ResolvedAll impacted services have now fully recovered.Affected components Codex (Operational)

item.title: Delayed visibility of newly added issues on project boards
item.description: Mar 3, 01:40 UTCUpdate - The delay for project board updates has increased to up to 3 hours. We've identified a potential cause and are working on remediation.Mar 3, 00:52 UTCUpdate - Project board updates — including adding issues, pull requests, and changing fields such as "Status" — are...

item.title: How to Kill the Code Review
item.description: Human-written code died in 2025. Code reviews will die in 2026.

item.title: Workers and Pages builds, Pages API unavailable
item.description: Mar 2, 21:48 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 2, 21:32 UTCMonitoring - Builds have been stable since 21:12 UTC and we are monitoring the fix.Mar 2, 21:16 UTCIdentified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.Mar 2, 20:54 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to...

item.title: Incident with Pull Requests /pulls
item.description: Mar 2, 20:02 UTCUpdate - We are experiencing issues with the Pull Requests dashboard that prevent users from filtering their pull requests. We have identified a mitigation and are deploying a fix. We'll post another update by 21:00 UTC.Mar 2, 19:23 UTCUpdate - We are seeing a degraded experience...

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: Mar 2, 18:54 UTCMonitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.Mar 2, 18:18 UTCInvestigating - We are seeing a repeat of this issue, we are currently investigating.Mar 2, 18:07 UTCMonitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.Mar 2, 17:56...

item.title: Cloudflare Peering Portal Authentication Issue
item.description: Mar 2, 18:09 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Feb 27, 13:24 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.Feb 27, 02:27 UTCIdentified - Cloudflare is aware of, and investigating an issue which impacts multiple customers/peers who use peering.cloudflare.com. This issue...

item.title: OpenAI’s “compromise” with the Pentagon is what Anthropic feared
item.description: On February 28, OpenAI announced it had reached a deal that will allow the US military to use its technologies in classified settings. CEO Sam Altman said the negotiations, which the company began pursuing only after the Pentagon’s public reprimand of Anthropic, were “definitely rushed.” In its...

item.title: Elevated errors in claude.ai
item.description: Mar 2, 17:23 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 2, 17:08 UTCInvestigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: New Chrome Vulnerability Let Malicious Extensions Escalate Privileges via Gemini Panel
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a now-patched security flaw in Google Chrome that could have permitted attackers to escalate privileges and gain access to local files on the system. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-0628 (CVSS score: 8.8), has been described as a case of...

item.title: Google Develops Merkle Tree Certificates to Enable Quantum-Resistant HTTPS in Chrome
item.description: Google has announced a new program in its Chrome browser to ensure that HTTPS certificates are secure against the future risk posed by quantum computers. "To ensure the scalability and efficiency of the ecosystem, Chrome has no immediate plan to add traditional X.509 certificates containing...

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.6
item.description: Mar 2, 16:50 UTCInvestigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: File uploads and file processing failing
item.description: Status: IdentifiedWe identified the issue and the team is working towards a mitigationAffected components Compliance API (Degraded performance) Image Generation (Degraded performance) GPTs (Degraded performance) Agent (Degraded performance) Login (Degraded performance) Deep Research (Degraded...

item.title: Errors in Sora API
item.description: Status: InvestigatingWe are investigating increased error dates in Sora API.Affected components Sora (Degraded performance)

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.6
item.description: Mar 2, 15:50 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 2, 15:49 UTCMonitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.Mar 2, 14:42 UTCIdentified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.Mar 2, 14:35 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to investigate...

item.title: Vulnerability Allowed Hijacking Chrome’s Gemini Live AI Assistant
item.description: Malicious extensions could hijack the Gemini Live in Chrome feature to spy on users and steal their files. The post Vulnerability Allowed Hijacking Chrome’s Gemini Live AI Assistant appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: OpenClaw Vulnerability Allowed Websites to Hijack AI Agents
item.description: Malicious websites could open a WebSocket connection to localhost on the OpenClaw gateway port, brute force passwords, and take control of the agent. The post OpenClaw Vulnerability Allowed Websites to Hijack AI Agents appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Madison Square Garden Data Breach Confirmed Months After Hacker Attack
item.description: The company is one of the many victims of the 2025 Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) hacking campaign. The post Madison Square Garden Data Breach Confirmed Months After Hacker Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: SD-WAN 0-Day, Critical CVEs, Telegram Probe, Smart TV Proxy SDK and More
item.description: This week is not about one big event. It shows where things are moving. Network systems, cloud setups, AI tools, and common apps are all being pushed in different ways. Small gaps in access control, exposed keys, and normal features are being used as entry points. The pattern becomes clear only...

item.title: The Download: protesting AI, and what’s floating in space
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. I checked out one of the biggest anti-AI protests ever Pull the plug! Pull the plug! Stop the slop! Stop the slop! For a few hours this...

item.title: I checked out one of the biggest anti-AI protests ever
item.description: Pull the plug! Pull the plug! Stop the slop! Stop the slop! For a few hours this Saturday, February 28, I watched as a couple of hundred anti-AI protesters marched through London’s King’s Cross tech hub, home to the UK headquarters of OpenAI, Meta, and Google DeepMind, chanting slogans and waving...

item.title: Nick Andersen Appointed Acting Director of CISA
item.description: Madhu Gottumukkala has been assigned to a new role within the Department of Homeland Security. The post Nick Andersen Appointed Acting Director of CISA appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: AWS Expands Security Hub Into a Cross-Domain Security Platform
item.description: The AWS Security Hub Extended plan aims to reduce security tool sprawl by correlating findings across multiple security domains. The post AWS Expands Security Hub Into a Cross-Domain Security Platform appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Challenge Pages issues with HTTP connections
item.description: Mar 2, 12:24 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 2, 12:13 UTCMonitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.Mar 2, 12:12 UTCIdentified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.Mar 2, 10:34 UTCInvestigating - Cloudflare is aware of, and...

item.title: Elevated errors on claude.ai, console, and claude code
item.description: Mar 2, 12:21 UTCUpdate - We have identified that the Claude API is working as intended. The issues we are seeing are related to Claude.ai and with the login/logout paths.Mar 2, 12:06 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to investigate this issue.Mar 2, 11:49 UTCInvestigating - We are currently...

item.title: Unable to view logs in Durable Objects dashboard
item.description: Mar 2, 12:10 UTCIdentified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.Mar 2, 11:58 UTCInvestigating - Cloudflare is aware of and investigating an issue impacting viewing logs in the Durable Objects dashboard. We are working to understand and mitigate the impact

item.title: Alert: NCSC advises UK organisations to take action following conflict in the Middle East
item.description: In response to the evolving events in the Middle East, the NCSC is advising that UK organisations review their cyber security posture.

item.title: How to Protect Your SaaS from Bot Attacks with SafeLine WAF
item.description: Most SaaS teams remember the day their user traffic started growing fast. Few notice the day bots started targeting them. On paper, everything looks great: more sign-ups, more sessions, more API calls. But in reality, something feels off: Sign-ups increase, but users aren’t activating. Server costs...

item.title: APT28 Tied to CVE-2026-21513 MSHTML 0-Day Exploited Before Feb 2026 Patch Tuesday
item.description: A recently disclosed security flaw patched by Microsoft may have been exploited by the Russia-linked state-sponsored threat actor known as APT28, according to new findings from Akamai. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-21513 (CVSS score: 8.8), a high-severity security feature bypass...

item.title: Newark (EWR) Datacenter Increase in HTTP Request latency
item.description: Mar 2, 09:15 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Feb 27, 13:40 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to monitor for any further issues.Feb 26, 17:16 UTCUpdate - Further investigation has confirmed that Data Loss Prevention (DLP) services were not impacted by this incident.Feb 26, 17:12 UTCUpdate...

item.title: Galbot Raises RMB 2.5 Billion, Becomes China’s Highest-Valued Unlisted Humanoid Robotics Firm
item.description: Galbot has raised $350 million, reinforcing its status as China’s highest-valued unlisted humanoid robotics company and accelerating large-scale industrial deployment.

item.title: Xiaomi Humanoid Robot Completes 3-Hour Autonomous Run in Auto Factory Trial
item.description: Xiaomi’s humanoid robot ran autonomously for three hours in a real auto factory, achieving a 90.2% success rate at a self-tapping nut workstation.

item.title: HumanMCP: A Human-Like Query Dataset for Evaluating MCP Tool Retrieval Performance
item.description: arXiv:2602.23367v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers contain a collection of thousands of open-source standardized tools, linking LLMs to external systems; however, existing datasets and benchmarks lack realistic, human-like user queries, remaining a critical gap in...

item.title: An Agentic LLM Framework for Adverse Media Screening in AML Compliance
item.description: arXiv:2602.23373v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Adverse media screening is a critical component of anti-money laundering (AML) and know-your-customer (KYC) compliance processes in financial institutions. Traditional approaches rely on keyword-based searches that generate high false-positive rates...

item.title: Causal Identification from Counterfactual Data: Completeness and Bounding Results
item.description: arXiv:2602.23541v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Previous work establishing completeness results for $\textit{counterfactual identification}$ has been circumscribed to the setting where the input data belongs to observational or interventional distributions (Layers 1 and 2 of Pearl's Causal...

item.title: Planning under Distribution Shifts with Causal POMDPs
item.description: arXiv:2602.23545v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In the real world, planning is often challenged by distribution shifts. As such, a model of the environment obtained under one set of conditions may no longer remain valid as the distribution of states or the environment dynamics change, which in turn...

item.title: Construct, Merge, Solve & Adapt with Reinforcement Learning for the min-max Multiple Traveling Salesman Problem
item.description: arXiv:2602.23579v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The Multiple Traveling Salesman Problem (mTSP) extends the Traveling Salesman Problem to m tours that start and end at a common depot and jointly visit all customers exactly once. In the min-max variant, the objective is to minimize the longest tour,...

item.title: Detoxifying LLMs via Representation Erasure-Based Preference Optimization
item.description: arXiv:2602.23391v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) trained on webscale data can produce toxic outputs, raising concerns for safe deployment. Prior defenses, based on applications of DPO, NPO, and similar algorithms, reduce the likelihood of harmful continuations, but not...

item.title: U-CAN: Utility-Aware Contrastive Attenuation for Efficient Unlearning in Generative Recommendation
item.description: arXiv:2602.23400v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generative Recommendation (GenRec) typically leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to redefine personalization as an instruction-driven sequence generation task. However, fine-tuning on user logs inadvertently encodes sensitive attributes into model...

item.title: Long Range Frequency Tuning for QML
item.description: arXiv:2602.23409v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantum machine learning models using angle encoding naturally represent truncated Fourier series, providing universal function approximation capabilities with sufficient circuit depth. For unary fixed-frequency encodings, circuit depth scales as...

item.title: Brain-OF: An Omnifunctional Foundation Model for fMRI, EEG and MEG
item.description: arXiv:2602.23410v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Brain foundation models have achieved remarkable advances across a wide range of neuroscience tasks. However, most existing models are limited to a single functional modality, restricting their ability to exploit complementary spatiotemporal dynamics...

item.title: EvoX: Meta-Evolution for Automated Discovery
item.description: arXiv:2602.23413v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent work such as AlphaEvolve has shown that combining LLM-driven optimization with evolutionary search can effectively improve programs, prompts, and algorithms across domains. In this paradigm, previously evaluated solutions are reused to guide...

item.title: Toward General Semantic Chunking: A Discriminative Framework for Ultra-Long Documents
item.description: arXiv:2602.23370v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-document topic segmentation plays an important role in information retrieval and document understanding, yet existing methods still show clear shortcomings in ultra-long text settings. Traditional discriminative models are constrained by fixed...

item.title: Task-Lens: Cross-Task Utility Based Speech Dataset Profiling for Low-Resource Indian Languages
item.description: arXiv:2602.23388v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The rising demand for inclusive speech technologies amplifies the need for multilingual datasets for Natural Language Processing (NLP) research. However, limited awareness of existing task-specific resources in low-resource languages hinders research....

item.title: Truncated Step-Level Sampling with Process Rewards for Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning
item.description: arXiv:2602.23440v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Training large language models to reason with search engines via reinforcement learning is hindered by a fundamental credit assignment problem: existing methods such as Search-R1 provide only a sparse outcome reward after an entire multi-step...

item.title: CiteAudit: You Cited It, But Did You Read It? A Benchmark for Verifying Scientific References in the LLM Era
item.description: arXiv:2602.23452v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scientific research relies on accurate citation for attribution and integrity, yet large language models (LLMs) introduce a new risk: fabricated references that appear plausible but correspond to no real publications. Such hallucinated citations have...

item.title: FHIRPath-QA: Executable Question Answering over FHIR Electronic Health Records
item.description: arXiv:2602.23479v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Though patients are increasingly granted digital access to their electronic health records (EHRs), existing interfaces may not support precise, trustworthy answers to patient-specific questions. Large language models (LLM) show promise in clinical...

item.title: Alibaba Tongyi Unveils Fun-CosyVoice3.5 and Fun-AudioGen-VD With FreeStyle Voice Generation
item.description: Alibaba Tongyi has launched Fun-CosyVoice3.5 and Fun-AudioGen-VD, enabling natural language-controlled voice cloning and fully immersive audio scene generation.

item.title: Meituan’s GN06 Launches Public Beta of AI-Native Browser Tabbit
item.description: Meituan has launched the public beta of Tabbit, an AI-native browser that unifies search, chat, and task automation in one intelligent workspace.

item.title: Noetix Robotics Secures Nearly RMB 1 Billion in Series B Funding, Led by CATL-Backed CD Capital
item.description: Noetix Robotics has raised nearly $140 million in a CATL-backed Series B round, doubling down on consumer-focused humanoid and biomimetic robots.
